incorporations.original: Its shelves were set so high
incorporations.replacement: Its supports were set so high
incorporations.reason: Italian 'staffe' means stirrups or brackets, not shelves; Gemini's 'supports' is more accurate to the desk hardware described

incorporations.original: various high *papaveri* — poppy-heads, men of consequence — of the military
incorporations.replacement: various high dignitaries of the military
incorporations.reason: The inline gloss interrupts the narrative flow; Gemini's clean 'dignitaries' conveys the sense of 'alti papaveri' without breaking the sentence

incorporations.original: there moved about in gloomy fashion several black beetles in civilian dress
incorporations.replacement: there darkened sadly several black beetles in civilian dress
incorporations.reason: 'Nereggiavano tristemente' means literally 'darkened sadly' — a visual verb about colour, not movement; Gemini's 'gloomed sadly' pointed towards this more literal rendering
Italian 'per prudenza' means prudence, not discretion; Gemini's wording is the accurate translation

incorporations.original: To the water-closet at the end of the corridor
incorporations.replacement: To the cabinet at the end of the corridor
incorporations.reason: 'Gabinetto' in period usage is a euphemistic 'cabinet'; 'water-closet' is too blunt and anachronistically specific for the register
More compact and forceful; matches the terse energy of 'romanamente sdegnoso'

incorporations.original: the landlady had not seen me enter
incorporations.replacement: the proprietress had not seen me enter
incorporations.reason: 'Proprietress' is consistent with the term used for the same character in Chapter the Eleventh; 'landlady' implies a lodging-house keeper rather than a café owner

incorporations.original: Yet he who was off guard tonight, I thought, might be wide awake and watchful tomorrow
incorporations.replacement: Yet he who tonight — I thought — might be awake and on the alert tomorrow…
incorporations.reason: The primary draft inserted 'off guard' which has no basis in the Italian; the synthesis restores the structure of the original ('chi stanotte — pensai — potrebbe essere desto ed all'erta domani') using Gemini's 'awake and on the alert' for 'desto ed all'erta'

edgren_influences.note: Edgren's entry confirms 'staffa' denotes a structural support element (stirrup, iron ring), not a shelf; this ruled out the primary draft's 'shelves' and confirmed Gemini's 'supports' as the right semantic field

Edgren gives only the literal 'poppy' and pejorative 'good-for-nothing', confirming that 'alti papaveri' is an idiom (tall poppies = bigwigs) not a word with a ready English equivalent; this supported dropping the primary draft's inline gloss in favour of the idiomatic 'dignitaries'
Edgren's first sense 'discern' was already used by both drafts; the dictionary confirmed this as the period-appropriate choice over a modern default like 'make out' or 'see'
